race.comment: VOSTOKOVA (6) returned in fine fashion with a dominant Ballina victory and will have taken a bunch of confidence from that win. Successful rider Turner sticks in the stirrups and can go right on with the job now at a bit of value. HIDDEN FUTURE (10) is a bit hit or miss but is one from one over this track and trip and is more than capable enough on her day. Top-three conveyance. TANGO QUEEN (5) resumes here but has revved up for this with a recent trial and gets some weight off from the inside marble. Ticks a few boxes. LENNYSTAR (11) is better than the recent effort suggests and can run an improved race.
